entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `query` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_search_history_query
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_search_history_query` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`query`)
